subcodes.first_line: O thou who art firm in the Covenant! Thy recent letter was received, and its contents brought abundant joy and fragrance to the hearts [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان نامه اخیر واصل و فحوایش سبب روح و ریحان قلوب گردید بسیار
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @praise and encouragement, @personal instructions, @call to action
